sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me verify the rotation direction and try clicking on the green target

# Current state after 2 clicks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

loop_positions = [
    (20,13), (20,19), (20,25), (20,31), (20,37), (20,43), (20,49),
    (26,49), (32,49), (38,49), (44,49),
    (44,43), (44,37), (44,31), (44,25), (44,19), (44,13),
    (38,13), (32,13), (26,13),
]

current_blocks = {}
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 16:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        current_blocks[(cr, cc)] = n['color']

current_colors = [current_blocks.get(pos, '?') for pos in loop_positions]
print(f"Current (after 2 clicks): {current_colors}")

# Try clicking on the green target (at row 32, col 59)
print("\nClicking on green target...")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 32, 'col': 59}])

# Check new state
seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
new_blocks = {}
for n in seg2['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 16:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        new_blocks[(cr, cc)] = n['color']

new_colors = [new_blocks.get(pos, '?') for pos in loop_positions]
print(f"After clicking green target: {new_colors}")

# Check rotation direction
print(f"\nComparison:")
for i in range(20):
    ccw = current_colors[(i+1) % 20]  # counterclockwise
    cw = current_colors[(i-1) % 20]   # clockwise
    if new_colors[i] == ccw:
        print(f"  Pos {i}: {current_colors[i]} -> {new_colors[i]} (CCW)")
    elif new_colors[i] == cw:
        print(f"  Pos {i}: {current_colors[i]} -> {new_colors[i]} (CW)")
    else:
        print(f"  Pos {i}: {current_colors[i]} -> {new_colors[i]} (???)")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
